text: To convert degrees to radians, we multiply the degree measure by pi over 180.
Part (i): Converting 240 degrees. We multiply 240 by pi over 180, which simplifies to 4 pi over 3 radians.
Part (ii): Converting minus 315 degrees. Multiplying by pi over 180 simplifies to minus 7 pi over 4 radians.
Part (iii): Converting 570 degrees. Multiplying by pi over 180 simplifies to 19 pi over 6 radians.
